headline: IDEXX SDMA Now Integrated into the Most Common Catalyst Chemistry Profiles
summary: WESTBROOK, Maine, May 19, 2026--IDEXX integrates SDMA into most common Catalyst chemistry profiles, enabling earlier detection of kidney disease through routine in‑clinic testing.
